entries.title: ADR-003: read_pool() for Graph Cohesion SQL Queries (col-029)
ADR-001 col-029: EDGE_SOURCE_NLI Named Constant in unimatrix-store
Pool selection for read-only context_status aggregates: always check compute_status_aggregates as direct precedent
GRAPH_EDGES tick writes: use write_pool_server() directly; insert between orphaned-edge compaction and TypedGraphState rebuild
co_access promotion SELECT missing quarantine-status filter causes compaction/promotion oscillation
